title: What if James Rolfe AVGN was Shinji
display_title: What if James Rolfe AVGN was Shinji
summary:
[]: What if James Rolfe (AVGN) was Shinji?             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 7:06 pm Misato: You will pilot Unit 01. Shinji: I'm not piloting that piece of shit! And i'm sure as hell not working with that German bitch or the mute!!! Say, can I crash your place... (Looks in the kitchen) Aw, fuck yeah! You got beer bitch!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Dec 29, 2009 7:55 pm You spelled his last name wrong. If Shinji was more like James Rolfe, Shinji would hate bad video games and would be an awesome movie reviewer. That's about it.

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:13 pm Shinji: It's the year 2015 and the only consoles we have are ones made by Sega?!

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:38 pm Well, eventually the power's gonna run out on him as he realizes that "A power cable?! This piece of shit runs on a fucking power cable?!" Then he'd probably proceed by somehow turning into a giant and taking a giant's dump in the angel's face.

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 8:53 pm Rodeo wrote: Then he'd probably proceed by somehow turning into a giant and taking a giant's dump in the angel's face.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Dec 29, 2009 9:44 pm *Shoots particle cannon and misses Arael* "God damn it! These controls are fucking horrible!"

[]:             Quote Post by GasmaskAvenger » Tue Dec 29, 2009 9:52 pm "This EVA is the bane of my existence. It's like a Gundam took a dump on a Megazord & it mutated into MechaGodzilla's puke"

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Dec 29, 2009 10:08 pm "This is bullshit. I get Freddy Kreuger and Jason coming into my home and

Article: What if James Rolfe AVGN was Shinji
zilla's puke"

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Tue Dec 29, 2009 10:08 pm "This is bullshit. I get Freddy Kreuger and Jason coming into my home and holding me hostage. What now? Is Rei going to walk in here naked?" *Watches the door with anticipation* *Keeps waiting* "You know what, that's just fucking unfair!"

[]:             Quote Post by DevRei17 » Tue Dec 29, 2009 10:20 pm You know, this whole idea came to me when I notice Shinji in his school uniform reminded me of AVGN. Say, I have a question for you guys: What would be Shinji's (AVGN'S) mental problems in the series? What would be his realationship with the other characters? Instead of a CD player, Shinji would play a Game Boy game with 26 levels and he plays it over and over again.

[]:             Quote Post by toe mash » Wed Dec 30, 2009 5:40 am Yet for some reason he never passes level 25 (or 26) ? :P
